data.name: ARGUMENT_NULL_ERROR
data.value: Parameter is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_OR_NULL_OBJECT
data.value: Notification Object is null or invalid.

data.name: EMAIL_REQUIRED
data.value: Email is required.

data.name: PASSWORD_REQUIRED
data.value: Password is required.

data.name: INVALID_USERID
data.value: User Identifier is invalid.

data.name: AUDIT_MODEL_IS_NULL
data.value: Audit Model is null.

data.name: USER_ACCOUNT_LOCKED
data.value: User account is currently locked.

data.name: LOGIN_RESTRICTED_TIME
data.value: Not permitted to logon at this time.

data.name: LOGIN_RESTRICTED_WORKSTATION
data.value: Not permitted to logon at this workstation.

data.name: PASSWORD_EXPIRED
data.value: Password expired. Please change your password.

data.name: FROMDATE_GREATER_TODATE
data.value: From date cannot be greater than To date.

data.name: INVALID_FROM_ADDRESS
data.value: From(email) address is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_TO_ADDRESS
data.value: To(email) address is null or invalid.

data.name: NO_CONTENT_FOR_EMAIL
data.value: Email has no Content.

data.name: SMTPSERVER_NOT_CONFIGURED
data.value: SMTP server is required in configuration for email notification.

data.name: PORT_NOT_CONFIGURED
data.value: Port is not configured for email notification.

data.name: USERNAME_MISSING_FOR_EMAIL
data.value: User name(From) is not configured for Email.

data.name: PASSWORD_MISSING_FOR_EMAIL
data.value: Password is not configured for Email.

data.name: TONUMBER_MISSING_FOR_SMS
data.value: To (Phone Number) is required in the configuration for SMS

data.name: NO_CONTENT_FOR_SMS
data.value: SMS has no Content.

data.name: USERNAME_MISSING_FOR_SMS
data.value: User name(From) is not configured for SMS.

data.name: PASSWORD_MISSING_FOR_SMS
data.value: Password is not configured for SMS.

data.name: FROMNUMBER_MISSING_FOR_SMS
data.value: From (Phone Number) is not configured for SMS.

data.name: USER_EXISTS
data.value: User already exists

data.name: INVALID_TWOFACTOR_TOKEN_PROVIDED
data.value: Two Factor Token is null or invalid.

data.name: TEMPLATE_NOT_EXISTS
data.value: Template does not exists.

data.name: SECURITYQUESTION_EXISTS
data.value: Security question already exists.

data.name: SECURITYQUESTION_ANSWER_MISMATCH
data.value: Answer does not match the security question.

data.name: USER_SECURITYQUESTION_EXISTS
data.value: Security question already exists

data.name: INVALID_PURPOSE
data.value: Purpose for Token is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_TWOFACTOR_TYPE
data.value: Two Factor Type cannot be none when TwoFactorEnabled is true.

data.name: TWOFACTOR_NOT_ENABLED
data.value: Two factor is not enabled for user.

data.name: INVALID_LDAP_USERNAME_OR_PASSWORD
data.value: LDAP username or password is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_LDAP_HOSTNAME
data.value: LDAP Hostname is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_LDAP_PORT
data.value: LDAP Port is null or invalid.

data.name: ROLE_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: Role already exists

data.name: ROLE_HAS_USERS
data.value: Role is assigned to users.

data.name: PASSWORD_PATTERN_NOT_MATCHED
data.value: Password specified does not match with required pattern.

data.name: PASSWORD_REQUIRED_LOWERCASE
data.value: Password should contain at least one lower case letter.

data.name: PASSWORD_REQUIRED_UPPERCASE
data.value: Password should contain at least one upper case letter.

data.name: INVALID_PASSWORD_LENGTH
data.value: Length of password is invalid.

data.name: PASSWORD_REQUIRED_NUMERIC
data.value: Password should contain at least one numeric value.

data.name: PASSWORD_REQUIRED_SPECIALCHAR
data.value: Password should contain at least one special case character.

data.name: INVALID_CURRENTPASSWORD
data.value: Current Password is invalid or null.

data.name: INVALID_NEWPASSWORD
data.value: New Password is null or invalid.

data.name: PASSWORD_MISMATCH
data.value: Password mismatched.

data.name: PASSWORD_SAME
data.value: Current password and new password should not be same.

data.name: PASSWORD_ALREADY_USED
data.value: Password should not be from previously used list.

data.name: PASSWORD_ABOUT_TO_EXPIRE
data.value: Password about to expire in {0} day(s).

data.name: INVALID_USERNAME
data.value: Username is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_USERNAME_LENGTH
data.value: Length of Username exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: FIRSTNAME_REQUIRED
data.value: First name is required.

data.name: INVALID_FIRST_NAME_LENGTH
data.value: Length of first name is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT
data.value: User Email Format is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_PHONENUMBER_LENGTH
data.value: Length of Phonenumber is invalid.

data.name: LASTNAME_REQUIRED
data.value: Last Name is required.

data.name: PHONENUMBER_REQUIRED
data.value: PhoneNumber is a required field.

data.name: DOB_REQUIRED
data.value: The date of birth is required.

data.name: INVALID_DOB
data.value: Date of Birth is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_SECURITYQUESTION_COUNT
data.value: User should select atleast {0} security questions.

data.name: UNIQUE_SECURITYQUESTION
data.value: Security question already exists.

data.name: CLIENT_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: Client name is required.

data.name: INVALID_LOGO_URI
data.value: Logo URI is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_CLIENT_URI
data.value: Client URI is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_POLICY_URI
data.value: Policy URI is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_REDIRECT_URI
data.value: Redirect URI value is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_POSTLOGOUT_REDIRECT_URI
data.value: Post Redirect URI is null or invalid.

data.name: CLIENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST
data.value: Client does not exist.

data.name: USER_CLAIMS_EXISTS
data.value: User claims already exists.

data.name: LOGIN_REMAINING_ATTEMPTS
data.value: Login failed. {0} login attempt(s) left.

data.name: LOGIN_NOT_ALLOWED
data.value: Login not allowed, Please verify Email, Phone number, Account are verified.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: Api Resource already exists.

data.name: CLIENT_ID_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Client Identifier exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: CLIENT_NOT_CONFIGURED_FOR_ACCESSTOKEN
data.value: Client not configured to receive access tokens via browser.

data.name: INVALID_CODE_CHALLENGE
data.value: Authorize Code Challenge is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_GRANTTYPE_FOR_CLIENT
data.value: Given Grant Type is not allowed for the Client.

data.name: INVALID_MAX_AGE
data.value: Authorize Request Max Age is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_NONCE
data.value: Nonce is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_PROMPT
data.value: Authorize Prompt is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_RESPONSE_MODE
data.value: Response mode is invalid or unsupported for grant type.

data.name: JWT_REQUEST_URI_NOT_SUPPORTED
data.value: JWT_Request and JWT_Request_URI is not supported.

data.name: MUST_INCLUDE_IDENTITY_SCOPES
data.value: Requests for id_token response type must include identity scopes.

data.name: MUST_INCLUDE_RESOURCE_SCOPES
data.value: Requests for token response type must include resource scopes and not identity scopes.

data.name: MUST_NOT_INCLUDE_RESOURCE_SCOPES
data.value: Requests for id_token response type must not include resource scopes.

data.name: NO_ACTIVE_USER_SESSION
data.value: No Active User Session.

data.name: OPEN_ID_SCOPE_MISSING
data.value: Identity scopes requested, but openid scope is missing.

data.name: REDIRECT_URI_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of redirect uri exceeded the maximum character limit.

data.name: REQUEST_SCOPE_NOT_ALLOWED
data.value: One or more requested scope(s) are not allowed for the client.

data.name: REQUIRES_OPEN_ID_SCOPE
data.value: Response type requires openid scope.

data.name: RESPONSE_TYPE_MISSING
data.value: Response type is missing or not supported.

data.name: INVALID_GRANTTYPE_FOR_ENDPOINT
data.value: Given Grant Type is not allowed for Authorize Endpoint.

data.name: SCOPE_MISSING
data.value: Scope is null.

data.name: SCOPE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of scope exceeded the maximum character limit.

data.name: URI_LENGTH_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of URI exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: INVALID_TOKEN_IN_INTROSPECTION
data.value: Token in Introspection is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_TOKEN_HINT_TYPE
data.value: Token Hint Type is null or invalid.

data.name: TOKEN_EXPIRED
data.value: Token has expired.

data.name: AUTH_CODE_EXPIRED
data.value: Authorization code has expired.

data.name: AUTH_CODE_MISSING
data.value: Authorization code is missing in the request.

data.name: AUTH_CODE_SCOPE_ERROR
data.value: Authorization code has no associated scopes.

data.name: AUTH_CODE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Authorization code exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: CLIENT_MISSING_CODE_CHALLENGE
data.value: Code Challenge for the client is required.

data.name: CLIENT_MISSING_CODE_CHALLENGE_METHOD
data.value: Code Challenge method for the client is required.

data.name: CLIENT_NOTAUTHORIZED_GRANT_TYPE
data.value: Client not authorized. Please check the supported grant types for client.

data.name: CODE_VERIFIER_MISSING
data.value: Code verifier is missing in the token request.

data.name: CODE_VERIFIER_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Code verifier exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: CODE_VERIFIER_TOO_SHORT
data.value: Length of Code verifier is below minimum character limit.

data.name: GRANT_TYPE_MISSING
data.value: Grant type is missing in the request.

data.name: GRANT_TYPE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Grant Type exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: INVALID_AUTH_CODE
data.value: Authorization code is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_CLIENT_BINDING
data.value: Client not authorized to use this authorization code.

data.name: OPEN_ID_SCOPE_NOT_ALLOWED
data.value: Client cannot request openid scopes in client credentials flow.

data.name: PASSWORD_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Password exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: REDIRECT_URI_MISSING
data.value: The redirect uri is null or invalid.

data.name: REFRESH_TOKEN_MISSING
data.value: Refresh token is null or invalid.

data.name: REFRESH_TOKEN_REQUEST_NOT_ALLOWED
data.value: Refresh token request not allowed in client credentials flow.

data.name: REFRESH_TOKEN_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of refresh token exceeded the maximum character limit.

data.name: REFRESH_TOKEN_VALIDATION_FAILED
data.value: Refresh token validation failed.

data.name: INVALID_CODE_VERIFIER
data.value: Code Verifier is null or invalid.

data.name: UNSUPPORTED_CODE_CHALLENGE_METHOD
data.value: Code challenge method is not supported.

data.name: USERNAME_MISSING
data.value: User name is null or invalid

data.name: USERNAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of username exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: USER_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED
data.value: User authentication failed.

data.name: INVALID_TOKEN_FORMAT
data.value: Token Format is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_SUBJECT_ID
data.value: Subject identifier is null or invalid.

data.name: NO_AUTHENTICATION_HANDLER_CONFIGURED
data.value: No authentication handler is configured to authenticate for the scheme.

data.name: NO_AUTHENTICATION_SCHEME_FOUND
data.value: Default authenication Scheme not found and Cookie Authentication Scheme not configured.

data.name: SESSION_MISSING_ENDPOINT_ENABLED
data.value: Check session endpoint is enabled, but session identifier is missing.

data.name: USER_DELETED
data.value: User is inactive.

data.name: SMS_CALLBACK_URL_MISSING
data.value: SMS callback url is required in configuration.

data.name: CONNECTION_STRING_INVALID
data.value: Database connection string is invalid.

data.name: LDAP_CONNECTION_FAILED
data.value: Unable to establish LDAP connection, please verify the hostname and port.

data.name: INVALID_SUBJECT
data.value: Email Subject is null or invalid.

data.name: NO_RECORDS_FOUND
data.value: No record(s) found in database.

data.name: SECURITY_QUESTION_USER_ASSOCIATED
data.value: Security question cannot be deleted as users are associated.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_ID_INVALID
data.value: Api Resource Identifier is invalid.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_IS_NULL
data.value: Api Resource is null.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_NAME_INVALID
data.value: Api Resource name is invalid.

data.name: APISCOPE_IS_NULL
data.value: Api Scope is null.

data.name: APISCOPE_ID_INVALID
data.value: Api Scope Identifier is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_FILEPATH_LOG
data.value: File Path in logger configuration is null or invalid.

data.name: LOGGER_CONFIGURATION_IS_NULL
data.value: Logger configuration is null.

data.name: LOGIN_SUCCESS
data.value: User logged in successfully.

data.name: NO_CHANGES_WRITTEN
data.value: No changes have been written to the database.

data.name: AUTHENTICATOR_APP_RESET_FAILED
data.value: Failed to reset authenticator app.

data.name: AUTHENTICATOR_APP_VERIFICATION_FAILED
data.value: Authenticator app token verification failed.

data.name: FETCHING_AUTHENTICATION_USER_FAILED
data.value: Unable to retrieve details for the user.

data.name: INVALID_ROP_VALIDATION_MODEL
data.value: Resource Owner Password is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_ROLE_CLAIM
data.value: RoleClaim is null or invalid.

data.name: ROLE_ID_REQUIRED
data.value: Role identifier is required.

data.name: ROLE_IS_NULL
data.value: Input role model is null.

data.name: ROLE_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: role name is required.

data.name: USERROLE_IS_NULL
data.value: User Role(s) is/are null.

data.name: USER_ID_REQUIRED
data.value: User Identifier is required.

data.name: INVALID_SECURITYQUESTION_MODEL
data.value: Security Question Model is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_TWOFACTOR_TYPE_ID
data.value: Two Factor Type Identifier is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_USER_SECURITYQUESTION_MODEL
data.value: User Security Model is null or invalid.

data.name: SECURITYQUESTION_NOT_EXISTS
data.value: Security question does not exist.

data.name: USER_SECURITYQUESTION_NOT_EXISTS
data.value: Security questions does not exists.

data.name: IDENTITYCLAIM_IS_NULL
data.value: Identity Claim is null.

data.name: IDENTITYRESOURCE_ID_INVALID
data.value: Identity Resource identifier is invalid.

data.name: IDENTITYRESOURCE_IS_NULL
data.value: Identity Resource is null

data.name: IDENTITYRESOURCE_NAME_INVALID
data.value: Identity Resource Name is invalid.

data.name: NO_TOKEN_FOUND
data.value: No token found in the request.

data.name: UNAUTHENTICATED_USER
data.value: User is not authenticated.

data.name: CLIENTSECRET_EXPIRES_AT_REQUIRED
data.value: Client Secret expiration time is required.

data.name: INACTIVE_CLIENT
data.value: Client is inactive

data.name: INVALID_STATE_IN_SESSION
data.value: State is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_STATE
data.value: State is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_TOKEN_LENGTH
data.value: Length of Token exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: TOKEN_MISSING
data.value: Token is required.

data.name: INVALID_CLIENT_OBJECT
data.value: Client Object is null or invalid.

data.name: CLIENT_SECRET_NOTAVAILABLE
data.value: Client secret is not available.

data.name: HEADER_CONTENT_NOTPROPER
data.value: Header content is not proper.

data.name: INVALID_SECURITY_TOKEN_ID
data.value: Security Token Identifier is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_CLIENT_SECRET
data.value: Client Secret is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_OPERATION
data.value: Current Authentication Operation is invalid as principal object is null.

data.name: INVALID_REQUEST
data.value: Request is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_REVOCATIONREQUEST
data.value: Revocation request is invalid.

data.name: CLIENTID_MAX_LENGTH_EXCEEDED
data.value: Length of Client Identifier exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: REFRESHTOKEN_DOESNOT_EXIST
data.value: Refresh token does not exists.

data.name: TOKEN_NULL_OR_INVALID
data.value: Token is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_EMAIL_CONFIGURATION
data.value: Email Configuration for notification is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_SMS_CONFIGURATION
data.value: SMS configuration for notification is null or invalid.

data.name: ROLECLAIM_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: Role claim already exists.

data.name: ROLECLAIM_NOT_EXISTS
data.value: Roleclaim does not exists.

data.name: CLIENT_SECRET_EXPIRED
data.value: Client secret has expired. Please regenerate the client secret.

data.name: CLIENT_SECRET_INVALID
data.value: Client Secret is invalid.

data.name: CLIENTID_MISSING_IN_REQUEST
data.value: Client Identifier in request is required.

data.name: CLIENTID_MISSING_IN_SECRET
data.value: Client Identifier in Client Assertion is required.

data.name: NO_CLIENT_RECORDS_FOUND
data.value: No client records found in the system.

data.name: FAILED_TO_STORE_REFRESHTOKEN
data.value: Failed to store refresh token.

data.name: IDENTITYRESOURCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: Identity Resource already exists.

data.name: INVALIDSCOPE_OR_NOT_ALLOWED
data.value: Scope is null or invalid or not allowed for client.

data.name: INVALID_SCOPE_CLAIMS
data.value: Scope does not exist/active in Api resource or scope master.

data.name: CLIENTSECRET_MAX_LENGTH_EXCEEDED
data.value: Length of Client Secret exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: INVALID_USER_CLAIMS
data.value: UserClaims is null or invalid.

data.name: LOGINREQUIRED_AND_PROMPT_NONE
data.value: User login is required but prompt mode specified contains none.

data.name: TOKEN_MAX_LENGTH_EXCEEDED
data.value: Length of token exceeded the maximum character limit.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_CLAIM_TYPE_REQUIRED
data.value: One or more api resource claim type(s) are required.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: Api Resource name is required.

data.name: APISCOPE_CLAIM_TYPE_REQUIRED
data.value: One or more api scope claim type(s) are required.

data.name: APISCOPE_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: One or more api scope name(s) are required.

data.name: IDENTITYRESOURCE_CLAIM_TYPE_REQUIRED
data.value: One or more identity resource claim type(s) are required.

data.name: IDENTITYRESOURCE_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: Identity Resource Name is required.

data.name: SUBJECT_CLAIM_VALUE_MISMATCH
data.value: Subject Claim Value mismatches with current user.

data.name: CLIENT_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: Client name already exists.

data.name: DEFAULT_PASSWORD_NEEDS_TO_CHANGE
data.value: Please change the default password.

data.name: INVALID_SECURITYQUESTION_ID
data.value: Security Question Identifier is invalid.

data.name: ALLOWED_SCOPES_REQUIRED
data.value: Allowed scopes is required.

data.name: INVALID_TERMSOFSERVICE_URI
data.value: Terms of Service URI is null or invalid.

data.name: SUPPORTED_GRANT_TYPES_REQUIRED
data.value: Supported grant types is required.

data.name: SUPPORTED_RESPONSE_TYPES_REQUIRED
data.value: Supported response types is required.

data.name: REDIRECT_URI_IS_MANDATORY
data.value: Redirect URI is mandatory for redirect-based flows.

data.name: INVALID_RESET_TOKEN_PROVIDED
data.value: Password Reset Token provided is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_USER_TOKEN
data.value: User Token provided is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_LOCKOUT_ENDDATE
data.value: User Lockout End date is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_USERID_FOR_SECURITYQUESTION
data.value: User Security Question does not belong to the given user.

data.name: INVALID_ROLEID
data.value: Role Identifier is null or invalid.

data.name: USER_MODEL_IS_NULL
data.value: Input user model is null.

data.name: USER_ROLE_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: User Role already exists.

data.name: USER_ROLE_NOT_EXISTS
data.value: User Role does not exist.

data.name: INVALID_CLAIMS_PRINCIPAL
data.value: Claims Principal is invalid

data.name: INVALID_EMAILCONFIRMATION_TOKEN_GENERATED
data.value: Generated email token is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_RESET_TOKEN_GENERATED
data.value: Password Reset Token generated is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_EMAILCONFIRMATION_TOKEN_PROVIDED
data.value: Email confirmation token is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_PHONECONFIRMATION_TOKEN_GENERATED
data.value: User Phonenumber token generated is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_PHONECONFIRMATION_TOKEN_PROVIDED
data.value: User Phonenumber token is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_TWOFACTOR_TOKEN_GENERATED
data.value: Generated twofactor token is null or invalid.

data.name: ROLECLAIM_CLAIMTYPE_REQUIRED
data.value: Roleclaim type is required.

data.name: ROLECLAIM_CLAIMVALUE_REQUIRED
data.value: Roleclaim value is required.

data.name: ROLE_NAME_INVALID
data.value: Role name is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_SECURITYQUESTION
data.value: Security Question is null or invalid.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_CLAIM_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: Api Resource Claim already exists.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_CLAIM_IS_NULL
data.value: Api Resource Claim is null.

data.name: APISCOPE_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: Api Scope already exists.

data.name: APISCOPE_CLAIMS_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: Api Scope Claims already exists.

data.name: APISCOPE_CLAIM_IS_NULL
data.value: Api Scope Claim is null.

data.name: APISCOPE_CLAIM_NOT_FOUND_FOR_TYPE
data.value: Api scope claim not found for the resource id and claim type.

data.name: APISCOPE_NAME_INVALID
data.value: Api Scope name is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_APIRESOURCE_CLAIM_TYPE_OR_RESOURCEID
data.value: Api Resource Identifier or Api Resource ClaimType is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_APISCOPE_CLAIM_TYPE_OR_SCOPEID
data.value: Api Scope Identifier or Api Scope ClaimType is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_APISCOPE_NAME_OR_RESOURCEID
data.value: Api Scope Name or Api Resource Identifier is invalid.

data.name: IDENTITYRESOURCE_CLAIM_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: Identity Resource Claim already exists.

data.name: INVALID_IDENTITYRESOURCE_CLAIM_TYPE_OR_RESOURCEID
data.value: Identity Resource Identifier or IdentityClaims Type for Identity Resource Claims is null or invalid.

data.name: USERCLAIM_CLAIMTYPE_REQUIRED
data.value: User Claim Type is required.

data.name: USERCLAIM_CLAIMVALUE_REQUIRED
data.value: User Claim Value is required.

data.name: INVALID_USER_SECURITYANSWER_LENGTH
data.value: Length of User Security Answer is invalid.

data.name: USER_SECURITYANSWER_REQUIRED
data.value: Security answer is required.

data.name: USER_DOESNOT_EXIST
data.value: User does not exist.

data.name: CONCURRENCY_FAILURE
data.value: Optimistic concurrency failure, object has been modified.

data.name: FAILED_TO_STORE_RETURNURL
data.value: Failed to store return url.

data.name: INVALID_ROLE_CLAIMVALUE_OR_CLAIMTYPE
data.value: Role claim type or claim values is null or invalid.

data.name: CLIENT_ID_REQUIRED
data.value: Client Identifier is required.

data.name: CLIENT_SECRET_REQUIRED
data.value: Client secret is required.

data.name: INVALID_USER_OR_PASSWORD
data.value: Username or Password is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_LAST_NAME_LENGTH
data.value: Length of last name is invalid.

data.name: USERNAME_REQUIRED
data.value: User name is required.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_CLAIM_TYPE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Api Resource Claim Type exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_DISPLAY_NAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Api Resource Display name exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_NAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Api Resource Name exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: APISCOPE_CLAIMTYPE_CREATEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Api Scope Claim Type exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: APISCOPE_NAME_OR_DISPLAYNAME_OR_CREATEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Name or DisplayName or CreatedBy for Api Scopes exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: INVALID_SECURITYANSWER_LENGTH
data.value: Security answer shall be atleast {0} characters.

data.name: INVALID_SECURITY_ANSWER
data.value: Answer for User Security Question is null or invalid.

data.name: NO_USERROLE_MAPPED
data.value: No UserRoles mapped for User.

data.name: DUPLICATE_LDAP_USER_FOUND
data.value: Multiple user account found for the Ldap credentials.

data.name: INVALID_LDAP_USERNAME
data.value: LDAP Username is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_USER
data.value: Invalid User.

data.name: TWO_FACTOR_ENABLED
data.value: Two Factor authentication should be disabled for resource owner password flow.

data.name: MUST_NOT_INCLUDE_OFFLINE_ACCESS_SCOPE
data.value: Requests for code id_token type in hybrid flow must not include offline access scope.

data.name: PASSWORD_CONTAINS_SPACE
data.value: Password should not contain spaces.

data.name: INVALID_CLAIM_TYPE
data.value: Claim Type is null or invaild

data.name: INVALID_CLAIM_VALUE
data.value: Claim Value is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_TEMPLATENAME
data.value: Template name is null or invalid.

data.name: LOGIN_FAILED
data.value: Login failed.

data.name: REDIRECT_URI_NOT_REGISTERED
data.value: Redirect Uri is not registered for the client.

data.name: UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN_TYPE
data.value: Token type is unsupported.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_CLAIM_CREATEDBY_MODIFIEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of CreatedBy/ModifiedBy for Api Resource Claim exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_CLAIM_CREATEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of CreatedBy for Api Resource Claim exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: APISCOPE_CLAIM_MODIFIEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of ModifiedBy for Api Scope Claim exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: APISCOPE_CLAIM_TYPE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Api Scope Claim Type exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: APISCOPE_DISPLAYNAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Api Scope Display Name exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: APISCOPE_MODIFIEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of ModifiedBy for Api Scope exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: APISCOPE_NAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Api Scope Name exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: CREATEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of CreatedBy Username exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: IDENTITYRESOURCE_CLAIM_CREATEDBY_MODIFIEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of CreatedBy/ModifiedBy for the identity resource claim exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: IDENTITYRESOURCE_CLAIM_CREATEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of CreatedBy for the identity resource claim exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: IDENTITYRESOURCE_CLAIM_TYPE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Identity Resource Claim Type exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: IDENTITYRESOURCE_DISPLAY_NAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Identity Resource Display name exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: IDENTITYRESOURCE_NAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Identity Resource Name exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: INVALID_ROLECLAIM_ROLEID
data.value: Role Identifier for Role Claim is null or invalid.

data.name: MODIFIEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: The specified length of modified by exceeds maximum limit.

data.name: ROLE_CLAIM_CREATEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of createdby for role claim exceeded the maximum character limit.

data.name: ROLE_CLAIM_MODIFIEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of modifiedby for role claim exceeded the maximum character limit.

data.name: ROLE_NAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of role name exceeded the maximum character limit.

data.name: AUDIT_TABLENAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Audit Table Name exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: INVALID_AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE
data.value: Audit action type is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_POST_REDIRECTURI_CLIENTID
data.value: Client Identifier in Post Redirect URIs is null or invalid.

data.name: INVALID_REDIRECTURI_CLIENTID
data.value: Client Identifier for Redirect URI is null or invalid.

data.name: POSTREDIRECTURI_CREATEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of CreatedBy for Post Redirect URI exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: POSTREDIRECTURI_MODIFIEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of ModifiedBy for Post Redirect URI exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: POST_REDIRECT_URI_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Post Redirect URI exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: REDIRECTURI_CREATEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of createdby for redirect uri exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: REDIRECTURI_MODIFIEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of modifiedby for redirect uri exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: ACTIVITY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Activity exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: EMAIL_LENGTH_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Email exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: INVALID_USER_TOKEN_GENERATED
data.value: User Token generated is null or invalid.

data.name: SECURITYQUESTION_ANSWER_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of user security question answer exceeded the maximum character limit.

data.name: SECURITYQUESTION_CREATEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of created by for user security question exceeded the maximum character limit.

data.name: SECURITYQUESTION_MODIFIEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of modified by for user security question exceeded the maximum character limit.

data.name: SECURITYQUESTION_REQUIRED
data.value: Security questions for user is required.

data.name: SECURITYQUESTION_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of security question exceeded the maximum character limit.

data.name: USERCLAIM_CREATEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of createdby for the user claim exceeded the maximum character limit.

data.name: USERCLAIM_MODIFIEDBY_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of modifiedby for the user claim exceeded the maximum character limit.

data.name: USERCLAIM_USERID_REQUIRED
data.value: User identifier in user claim is required

data.name: USER_SECURITYQUESTION_SECURITY_ID_REQUIRED
data.value: User Security Identifier is required.

data.name: USER_SECURITYQUESTION_USERID_REQUIRED
data.value: User identifier in user security question is required.

data.name: NO_USERROLE_CLAIM_MAPPED
data.value: No user role claim(s) mapped.

data.name: RESTRICTED_API_FOR_LDAP_USER
data.value: Api is restricted for Ldap user.

data.name: INVALID_ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_RANGE
data.value: Access token expiration value not within configured range.

data.name: INVALID_AUTHORIZATION_CODE_EXPIRE_RANGE
data.value: Value not in the Authorization Code Expiration Range.

data.name: INVALID_IDENTITY_TOKEN_EXPIRE_RANGE
data.value: The value provided is not in the identity token expiration range.

data.name: INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRE_RANGE
data.value: Value not in the Refresh Token Expiration Range.

data.name: BACK_CHANNEL_REQUIRED_SESSIONID
data.value: Session Identifier for BackChannel Client logout is required.

data.name: INVALID_LOGOUT_TOKEN_EXPIRE_RANGE
data.value: Value not in the Logout Token Expiration Range.

data.name: UNAUTHORIZED_ACCESS
data.value: Unauthorized access.

data.name: SIGNING_ALGORITHM_IS_INVALID
data.value: Signing algorithm is invalid.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_CLAIM_VALUE_REQUIRED
data.value: One or more api resource claim value(s) are required.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_CLAIM_VALUE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Api Resource Claim Value exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: APISCOPE_CLAIM_VALUE_REQUIRED
data.value: One or more api scope claim value(s) are required.

data.name: APISCOPE_CLAIM_VALUE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Api Scope Claim Value exceeded maximum character limit.

data.name: DUPLICATE_USER_ROLE_INPUT
data.value: Input model contains duplicate user and role mapping.

data.name: ACCESS_DENIED
data.value: Access denied.

data.name: NOT_FOUND
data.value: Not found.

data.name: INVALID_PHONE_NUMBER
data.value: User Phonenumber Format is invalid.

data.name: CLIENT_NAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Length of Client name exceeded maximimum character limit.

data.name: INVALID_IDENTITY_TOKEN
data.value: Identity Token is invalid.

data.name: APIRESOURCE_CLAIM_ID_INVALID
data.value: Api Resource Claim Identifier is invalid.

data.name: APISCOPE_CLAIM_ID_INVALID
data.value: Api Scope Claim Identifier is invalid.

data.name: IDENTITYRESOURCE_CLAIM_ID_INVALID
data.value: Identity Resource Claim Identifier is invalid.

data.name: INVALID_ROLECLAIM_ID
data.value: Role Claim Identifier is null or invalid.

data.name: INACTIVE_CLIENT_POSTLOGOUTREDIRECTURI
data.value: Client post redirect uri is inactive.

data.name: INACTIVE_CLIENT_REDIRECTURI
data.value: Client redirect uri is inactive.

data.name: TOKEN_REVOKED
data.value: Token has revoked.

data.name: INVALID_LDAP_CONFIGURATION
data.value: Ldap configuration invalid.
